source.name: Complete Alchemist
source.author: Michael Holik, Matthew Pennell, Alexander Binns
source.description:
Boom! An explosion rattles the room as a goblin alchemist cackles maniacally.
Embrace the mad scientist within you! Blast things to bits with alchemical bombs, brew an entire shop's worth of potions, and tinker with even stranger scientific discoveries. And you can customize your Alchemist to your heart's content to suit almost any playstyle.
The Complete Alchemist is the definitive version of our Alchemist class, fully updated to the 2024 edition of the rules! If you've read the Alchemist before, it's time to give it another look, because this class has seen a total overhaul: completely reworked Bombs, potion brewing, Reagents, and Discoveries! Around every corner, the class is cleaner, more capable, easier to play, and more fun.
The Complete Alchemist realizes the potential of the Alchemist with new and exciting archetypes from the Ooze Rancher to the paint-slinging Pigmentist. Moreover, it includes a suite of Monstrous Grafts, for when you absolutely, positively must have a dragon's head surgically attached to your body.
This class is compatible with 5th Edition and is published by Mage Hand Press under the Open Gaming License.
